data.name: Ardor for Depravity
data.detailed_description:
The journey to the depths of depravity:

Embark on a journey of self discovery with Emily. Help her navigate the dangers of a medieval fantasy world and be her guide through the perils of an unfamiliar town. Unlock her true potential through various encounters with many characters and lead her into a depths of depravity where she can truly find what she really is and fully realize her desires. Free her from  shackles of shame and embarrassment and help her accept her true nature.

What to expect:

The game is a narratively rich corruption visual novel with sandbox elements, with many choices and consequences. Variety of events to experience and guide Emily through, with emphasis on accepting who you truly are and on the tension that it can create in oneself. When you slowly move towards something that you are both afraid of but also a little bit excited and don't exactly know how you should feel about it. The contradictory voices within you that tells you on one hand that you should not be doing this and not to enjoy certain things and repress those feelings deep inside of you. And on the other hand your mind produces this niggling thoughts, a little whispers of truth that you don't want to admit to yourself. This is the journey of descending more and more into the depths of depravity, giving in to your carnal desires. That feeling of being scared but intrigued at first, but more and more you realize that you like where you are going and what you are becoming.

Game focus:

The game is primarily focused on corrupting Emily through various encounters with numerous other characters. This includes all variety of flavors and scenarios. Emily starts as a virtuous, little bit naive girl from a small town with little to no experience and as she is plunged into unfamiliar territory, you as a player will help her navigate this treacherous new place. Gradually she becomes more and more depraved and her escapades will progressively become more daring and intense.

Main Features:

  • Medieval Fantasy visual novel game with sandbox elements

  • Guide Emily on her journey of self discovery

  • Main quest line and many side events to experience

  • Choices and consequences

  • Point and Click Interface

  • Quest log and guidance on what to do next

  • NSFW stills and animations

  • Gallery with hints

data.short_description: A story driven visual novel with sandbox elements. Heavy focus on corruption with adult scenes, themes and elements. A story of Emily and her journey towards discovering her true nature.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 (64-bit)
  • 處理器: 1.5 GHz Dual Core
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 compatible GPU
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0c
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 (64-bit) or higher
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Dual Core or faster
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Dedicated GPU with OpenGL 2.1+ support
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: macOS 10.10 (Yosemite)
  • 處理器: Intel Core 2 Duo or Apple Silicon (Rosetta 2)
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 compatible GPU
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
mac_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: macOS 11.0 (Big Sur) or newer
  • 處理器: Intel i5 or Apple Silicon
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Dedicated GPU or Apple Silicon integrated
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 16.04 LTS (64-bit)
  • 處理器: 1.5 GHz Dual Core
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 compatible GPU
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
linux_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 20.04 LTS or newer
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Dual Core or faster
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Dedicated GPU with OpenGL 2.1+ support
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
